title: SICS Human-State Proxy Benchmark QC Report Schema v0.1
description: Schema for validating qc_report.json in the SICS Human-State Proxy Benchmark Track synthetic/sample package. This schema is for public helper use only. It does not define CAIS, does not define Sal-Meter, does not grant compliance, does not validate benchmark performance, and does not create diagnostic, therapeutic, clinical, surveillance, employment, insurance, educational, legal, or eligibility authority.

schema_version.description: Schema version for this QC report structure.

dataset_type.description: Dataset class. Public sample data must be synthetic or structure-demo only.

qc_status.description: Overall QC status for public helper release. This is not a benchmark performance status.

raw_human_data_present.description: Public synthetic/sample packages must not contain raw human data.

identifiable_data_present.description: Public synthetic/sample packages must not contain identifiable data.

clinical_data_present.description: Public synthetic/sample packages must not contain clinical data.

face_voice_video_audio_present.description: Public synthetic/sample packages must not contain real face, voice, video, or audio data.

sal_meter_input_present.description: Current proxy sample packages must not contain Sal-Meter input data.

cais_compliance_claim_present.description: Public helper files must not contain CAIS compliance claims.

synthetic_status_declared.description: Whether synthetic/sample status is explicitly declared.

stream_checks.description: Per-stream QC checks for timestamp, dropout, and public release boundaries.

notes.description: Optional stream-level QC note. Must not contain participant identifiers, clinical interpretation, Sal-Meter validation claims, or CAIS compliance claims.

leakage_review.description: Leakage review for synthetic/sample release. This is not a locked benchmark validation review.

final_boundary.description: Final boundary statement. Must state that the package is synthetic/sample only and not evidence, not Sal-Meter validation, and not CAIS compliance.
